name: Iter15 — Batch review complete toast
description: Verify a toast notification appears after batch review completes stating how many PRs were analyzed.

planSteps.description: In the textarea, enter two PR URLs each on a separate line: https://github.com/OWASP/NodeGoat/pull/300 and https://github.com/vercel/next.js/pull/1
Wait up to 120 seconds for both reviews to complete
A toast notification appears in the bottom-right with a message indicating batch review is complete and the number of PRs analyzed (e.g. 'Batch review complete! 2 PRs analyzed')
